title_en: Master Student · AI4Rad Lab · Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital
title_cn: 硕士研究生 · AI4Rad Lab · 上海市第六人民医院
bio_en: Master's student at AI4Rad Lab, Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital, SJTU School of Medicine. Research focuses on medical imaging artificial intelligence, musculoskeletal radiology, bone tumor X-ray analysis, and clinical validation of AI models.
bio_cn: 上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院 AI4Rad Lab 硕士研究生。研究方向为医学影像人工智能、骨肌影像分析、骨肿瘤 X 线分析以及医学 AI 模型的临床验证。
interests_cn: 骨肿瘤 X 线智能分析

news_en.text: HR-LLM-Stroke — a multi-agent LLM framework for emergency stroke treatment recommendation — published in Journal of Medical Internet Research (IF 8.2).
Joined AI4Rad Lab as a master's student.

news_cn.text: HR-LLM-Stroke —— 面向急诊卒中治疗推荐的多智能体大语言模型框架，发表于 Journal of Medical Internet Research（IF 8.2）。
作为硕士研究生加入 AI4Rad Lab。
